description: Partnership agreement. Mentioning 30 dirhams and dated to the 1st decade of the month [... of the year] 1490 Sel. (= 1178/79 CE). Mentions [...] b. Avraham, Petaḥya, Abū ʿAlī b. Thābit, Saʿīd b. Abū l-Khayr, Manṣūr the son of the brother of the faqīh, and Futuḥ (perhaps identical with Petaḥya). Reused on recto for piyyuṭ. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
